 +============Welcome to FreeBSD===========+ +o   .--`         /y:`      +.
 |                                         |  yo`:.            :o      `+-
 |  1. Boot Multi User [Enter]             |   y/               -/`   -o/
 |  2. Boot [S]ingle User                  |  .-                  ::/sy+:.
 |  3. [Esc]ape to loader prompt           |  /                     `--  /
 |  4. Reboot                              | `:                          :`
 |                                         | `:                          :`
 |  Options:                               |  /                          /
 |  5. [K]ernel: kernel (1 of 2)           |  .-                        -.
 |  6. Configure Boot [O]ptions...         |   --                      -.
 |  7. Select Boot [E]nvironment...        |    `:`                  `:`
 |                                         |      .--             `--.
 |                                         |         .---.....----.
